allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys from html.parser import HTMLParser class E\(HTMLParser\): def __init__\(self\): super\(\).__init__\(\); self.skip=False; self.t=[] def handle_starttag\(self,t,a\): if t in \('script','style'\): self.skip=True def handle_endtag\(self,t\): if t in \('script','style'\): self.skip=False def handle_data\(self,d\): if not self.skip: s=d.strip\(\) if s and len\(s\)>2: self.t.append\(s\) p=E\(\); p.feed\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('\\n'.join\(p.t\)\) ")
